title: Today's Panchang
metaTitle: Hindu Panchang Today — Tithi, Nakshatra, Rahukaal | Taara Jyotishyam
metaDescription: Free daily Panchang for Indian cities — tithi, nakshatra, yoga, karana, sunrise, sunset, and Rahukaal. Lahiri sidereal, calculated at local sunrise.
subtitle: Tithi, nakshatra, yoga, and auspicious timings for your city — computed at sunrise using Lahiri ayanamsa.
note: Angas are calculated at sunrise for the selected city. Rahukaal divides the day from sunrise to sunset into eight equal parts.
